name: admin-only
description: Authorization middleware that gates access on the JWT claim `role === 'admin'`. Expects a prior auth middleware (typically `jwt-auth`) to have populated `ctx.state.identity.claims`. On match, falls through; on mismatch (or missing identity), throws GlobalError(403) with a structured body. Pair with `jwt-auth` to build a complete authn+authz chain — the trigger declares both, in order, and downstream steps see the verified admin identity at ctx.state.identity.

body.hint: JWT must carry `role: 'admin'` claim. Current role: see ctx.state.identity.claims.role
